Crumbl bakes new Strawberry Brownie and more for this week from December 29, 2025, through January 3, 2026.
With the new year arriving this week, the cookie bakery chain is also offering a deal on December 31, 2025, where you can get a 6-pack of cookies for the price of a 4-pack. Here's what you'll find on the dessert rotation at Crumbl this week: - New Strawberry Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie infused with freeze-dried strawberry pieces, topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting, fresh strawberry slices, and a white drizzle. - Birthday Cake Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting, more Oreo pieces, and rainbow sprinkles. - New York Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled buttery graham cracker cookie topped with vanilla cheesecake frosting and graham cracker streusel. - Nilla Bean Cupcake Cookie - A warm vanilla bean cookie topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and white sprinkles. - S'mores Skillet Cookie featuring Hershey's Chocolate - A warm, graham cookie baked with pieces of Hershey's Chocolate, topped with marshmallow mousse, a drizzle of melted chocolate, and graham cracker streusel. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. - Waffle Cookie - A warm waffle cookie topped with a scoop of buttercream frosting and served with a side of syrup. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme Offers $12 Donut Dozens Through December 28, 2025
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme is running a post-Christmas deal where you can get a Classic Assorted or Original Glazed dozen donuts for $12 each.
The discounted dozen is available at participating US locations online and in-store through December 28, 2025. You can purchase up to four discounted dozens. The chain also has a limited-time, online-only deal where you can get a 24-count box of Original Glazed Donut Dots for $5 when you make a purchase of $5 or more. You'll need to use the code "DOTS" to redeem the offer. Prices vary, but an Original Glazed Dozen normally costs $21.99 near me in Los Angeles, while a Classic Assorted Dozen is $22.99. A 24-count box of Original Glazed Donut Dots is normally $6.29. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Introduces New Confetti Cookie Freeze
entry.summary:
In time for New Year's, Taco Bell welcomes the new Confetti Cookie Freeze as its latest flavor of slush ice.
The drink features a vanilla cream soda slushy mixed with rainbow sprinkles, a pink sugar cookie-flavored syrup, and a swirl of vanilla creme. The Confetti Cookie Freeze is available now for a limited time for a suggested price of $3.69 for a 16-oz regular and $3.89 for a 20-oz large (it costs $3.99 and $4.19, respectively) near me in Los Angeles. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Confetti Cookie Freeze (regular size) Calories - 220 Fat - 1g (Saturated Fat - 0.5g) Sodium - 80mg Carbs - 55g (Sugar - 53g) Protein - 0g

entry.title: KFC Offers BOGO 8-piece Fried Chicken Bucket Deal on December 31, 2025
entry.summary:
As a special for New Year's Eve, KFC is offering a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece buckets of fried chicken on December 31, 2025.
The deal is available only to KFC Rewards members when ordering online through the KFC website or mobile app at participating locations nationwide. The 8-piece bucket is comprised of fried chicken legs and thighs only (i.e., dark meat). According to KFC, millions of people order takeout or delivery on New Year's Eve and "fried chicken, bubbly, and caviar have become the high–low pairing of the moment." Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pizza Hut Offers BOGO Large Pizza Deal from December 26 through December 28, 2025
entry.summary:
From December 26 through December 28, 2025, Pizza Hut is offering a deal where you can get a free large pizza when you buy any large pizza online at the regular menu price using the code "SUPREME".
The deal coincides with the first weekend of the debut of the new movie, Marty Supreme, which launches on Christmas Day. Pizza Hut is calling it the "Party Supreme Deal." The deal will be available nationwide at participating locations. Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses
entry.summary:
Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses feature white creme droplet-shaped Kisses embedded with cookie pieces.
A 9-oz bag retails for $5.99, but I received this courtesy of Hershey's.
There was a nice brown sugar and cinnamon cookie smell when I opened the bag.
There were notes of cinnamon and vanilla to give the white creme a snickerdoodle flavor, while the cookie pieces delivered a nice crunch. It was creamy and not too sweet. The cookie pieces reminded me of Hershey's Cookies 'N' Creme, only not chocolate.
When it comes down to it, I like snickerdoodles, and Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses capture the flavor well with some crunch to boot. Nutritional Info - Snickerdoodle Cookie Hershey's Kisses Serving Size - 7 pieces (54g) Calories - 160 Fat - 6g (Saturated Fat - 5g) Sodium - 35mg Carbs - 20g (Sugar - 16g) Protein - 2g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Chipotle Unveils New High Protein Menu
entry.summary:
Ahead of the new year and its requisite resolutions, Chipotle is launching its first-ever High Protein Menu in the US and Canada on Tuesday, December 23, 2025.
The new curated menu includes options ranging from 15 to 80 grams of protein per item, including a new High Protein Cup, which is a 4-oz cup of the chain's Adobo Chicken (32g protein, 180 calories) for an average price of $3.82. Also on Chipotle's High Protein Menu are: - Double High Protein Bowl (81g protein, 11g fiber, 760 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, light white rice, black beans, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and extra romaine lettuce. - High Protein-High Fiber Bowl (46g protein, 14g fiber, 540 calories) - Adobo Chicken, light brown rice, black beans, fajita veggies, roasted chili-corn salsa, fresh tomato salsa, and romaine lettuce - High Protein-Low Calorie Salad (36g protein, 10g fiber, 470 calories) - Adobo Chicken, Supergreens lettuce mix, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, and guacamole. - Double High Protein Burrito (79g protein, 6g fiber, 840 calories) - A double portion of Adobo Chicken, fresh tomato salsa, fajita veggies, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla. - Adobo Chicken Taco (15g protein, 190 calories) - Adobo Chicken, fajita veggies, fresh tomato salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, and romaine lettuce on a soft flour tortilla. Photo via Chipotle. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Salted Caramel Brownie and More Through December 27, 2025
entry.summary:
Crumbl bakes its new Salted Caramel Brownie and more for a limited time from December 22 through December 27, 2025.
With Christmas coming in a few days, this week's lineup is heavy on the holiday/winter themes. Here's what you can expect: - New Salted Caramel Brownie - A warm chocolate brownie topped with a layer of caramel, a semi-sweet chocolate drizzle, and a pinch of sea salt. - Peppermint Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled vanilla bean cookie with peppermint pieces topped with peppermint white drop frosting and crushed peppermint pieces. - Biscoff Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled brown sugar cookie topped with a buttercream made with Biscoff cookie butter and cookie crumbs. - Sugar Cookie featuring Mother's Reindeer Games - A warm sugar cookie with red and green sprinkles, topped with a pool of white chocolate (with more sprinkles) and a Mother's Reindeer Games cookie. - Frozen Hot Chocolate Cookie - A chilled chocolate cookie topped with hot cocoa-flavored mousse and mini marshmallows. - Cinnamon Roll Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie topped with cinnamon streusel and a swirl of vanilla cream cheese frosting. - Semi-sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a dash of flaky sea salt. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!
